A sectionless config struct owns the whole file; mixing it with
sectioned structs is an error.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr" default:":8080"`
}
-- store/config.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Shared *shared.Config
	Store  *store.Config
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/config.go:3:1: sectionless config struct Config owns the whole file and cannot be combined with sectioned config structs
  help: sectionless struct declared at $WORK/shared/config.go:3:1; declare a section for every config struct
